svg.title: User vector construction and FAISS search flow with example data
svg.desc: Shows how 3 Redis events become a weighted user vector, then query FAISS to return top candidate movies

g.text: Spring Boot consumer → pushed to Redis list user_events:u_42

svg.text: ② Redis sliding window — last 3 events for u_42
normalize: divide each weight by sum (5.27) → [0.716, 0.304, −0.019]
④ Weighted average of item embeddings → raw user vector

g.text: each emb() is a row from item_embeddings.npy, looked up by movie index

svg.text: ⑤ Cache in Redis, then query FAISS
Filter seen items (Redis Set) → pass 200–300 candidates to ranker
